arts.ttl: Arsenal defender Gabriel warns Man City his side are 'waiting for them' at the Emirates Stadium as he breaks his silence on Erling Haaland's 'provocative' ball throw at the Etihad
arts.sum: Arsenal centre-back Gabriel Magalhaes has issued a warning to title rivals Manchester City after Sunday's fierce encounter at the Etihad.

arts.ttl: Trossard 'claims not to have heard whistle' before red card against Man City
arts.sum: Leandro Trossard has reportedly told his teammates that he did not hear the referee's whistle before being sent off during Arsenal's 2-2 draw with Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Rodri spotted heading to hospital consultation in Barcelona as Man City fear key midfielder has suffered season-ending injury against Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder Rodri has been spotted attending a specialist consultation at a hospital in Barcelona as the Premier League champions look for a diagnosis on his injury.

arts.ttl: Rodri spotted for first time after Man City injury blow as midfielder departs UK
arts.sum: Rodri picked up an injury during Man City's Premier League clash against Arsenal on Sunday

arts.ttl: Arsenal could play 16-year-old goalkeeper Jack Porter against Bolton with David Raya likely to be rested after picking up a knock at Man City and Pedro Neto cup tied
arts.sum: Arsenal could be forced to play 16-year-old rookie goalkeeper Jack Porter after David Raya limped off in Sunday's enthralling 2-2 draw against Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Rodri reaction speaks volumes as Man City star spotted for first time after brutal injury blow
arts.sum: Rodri picked up a worrying-looking injury during Manchester City’s dramatic draw with Arsenal on Sunday afternoon and has since been spotted for the first time since a bombshell update

arts.ttl: Replacing the irreplaceable - Pep's big Rodri conundrum?
arts.sum: If Manchester City are to win an unprecedented fifth consecutive Premier League title, they may need to do so without Rodri, their most important player.

arts.ttl: 'He gets compared to Jorginho': Man City expert names four academy stars who could play vs. Watford
arts.sum: Man City expert Steven McInerney from Esteemed Kompany tells Sports Mole which academy stars, including one compared to Jorginho, could play for Pep Guardiola's senior side in Tuesday's EFL Cup clash with Watford.

arts.ttl: Rodri's season-ending injury just made Man City, Pep Guardiola's job so much harder
arts.sum: Losing the influential midfielder to a potentially season-ending injury is a huge blow to Manchester City's fortunes this season. Can Pep Guardiola & Co. overcome it to win the league?

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Gabriel sends hostile warning to Erling Haaland and Man City team-mates
arts.sum: Arsenal claimed a share of the spoils at Manchester City on Sunday in a controversial and bad-tempered affair between the two Premier League title hopefuls
